description: You are a university teaching assistant preparing an observational answer key for an astrophysics lab on orbital mechanics. Configure Stellarium as a 'virtual space telescope' by setting the date and time to November 1, 2023, at 06:00 UTC, disabling the atmosphere and ground, and enabling the equatorial grid and planet labels. Capture high-magnification screenshots of Jupiter (showing its disk and moons) and Saturn (showing its rings and moons) to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Create an answer key file at /home/ga/Desktop/astrometry_key.txt containing the reference date, the names of Jupiter's four Galilean moons, and Saturn's largest moon.
